Description: Things are going well for this Character and their side right now.
Rules: A Flowing Tide Success Level can act as either a Facet Success Level (such as Trials Gladiator Successes, or Generic such as Extra Effort.

Description: Things should be going well, but they are not for some reason.
Rules: A Flowing Tide Failure Level can act as only a Generic Failure Level, and usually acts Narratively (e.g. as a Small loss or Tonal Dissonance.

Description: Things should be going badly, but somehow they are not.
Rules: An Ebbing Tide Success level can act as a Generic Success Level only (e.g. ).

Description: Things should be going badly for this Character and definitly are.
Rules: An Ebbing Tide Failure Level may act as a Facet Failure Level or as a Generic Failure Level as the Yarn-Teller prefers.
